headline: Philip Morris Shares Ease After Company Trims 2026 Earnings Outlook (PM)
summary: Philip Morris International (NYSE:PM) shares edged lower in premarket trading on Tuesday after the tobacco group reduced its full-year adjusted earnings guidance, reflecting the impact of an expected impairment charge and currency-related headwinds. The stock slipped around 1% before the opening bell as investors assessed the updated outlook.
